title: stelis erucosa
intro: Stelis erucosa, also known as Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis erucosa include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing skin irritations. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments.
